declarations.name: RgThemeElement
declarations.summary: Provides color, density, and motion context.

declarations.name: RgButtonElement
declarations.summary: Primary action control with kinetic press feedback.

declarations.name: RgIconButtonElement
declarations.summary: Compact, accessible icon-only action.

declarations.name: RgLinkElement
declarations.summary: Navigation action backed by a native anchor.

declarations.name: RgInputElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated single-line text input.

declarations.name: RgTextareaElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated multiline text input.

declarations.name: RgSelectElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated native select with declarative options.

declarations.name: RgOptionElement
declarations.summary: Declarative option metadata for rg-select.

declarations.name: RgCheckboxElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated binary or indeterminate choice.

declarations.name: RgSwitchElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated on/off setting.

declarations.name: RgRadioGroupElement
declarations.summary: Keyboard-navigable form-associated radio group.

declarations.name: RgRadioElement
declarations.summary: Radio option owned by rg-radio-group.

declarations.name: RgSliderElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated numeric range input.

declarations.name: RgBadgeElement
declarations.summary: Compact status or category label.

declarations.name: RgAvatarElement
declarations.summary: Image avatar with initials fallback and optional presence status.

declarations.name: RgAvatarGroupElement
declarations.summary: Overlapping avatar collection with a deterministic overflow summary.

declarations.name: RgCardElement
declarations.summary: Content surface with optional media, header, and footer regions.

declarations.name: RgDividerElement
declarations.summary: Horizontal or vertical content separator.

declarations.name: RgAlertElement
declarations.summary: Persistent contextual feedback.

declarations.name: RgProgressElement
declarations.summary: Determinate or indeterminate task progress.

declarations.name: RgMeterElement
declarations.summary: Displays a scalar measurement within a known range.

declarations.name: RgSpinnerElement
declarations.summary: Compact indeterminate busy indicator.

declarations.name: RgSkeletonElement
declarations.summary: Placeholder for pending content.

declarations.name: RgToastRegionElement
declarations.summary: Accessible live region and toast viewport.

declarations.name: RgToastElement
declarations.summary: Temporary status notification.

declarations.name: RgTabsElement
declarations.summary: Roving-tabindex tab set.

declarations.name: RgTabElement
declarations.summary: Interactive tab owned by rg-tabs.

declarations.name: RgTabPanelElement
declarations.summary: Content panel owned by rg-tabs.

declarations.name: RgAccordionElement
declarations.summary: Single or multiple disclosure group.

declarations.name: RgAccordionItemElement
declarations.summary: Native-details disclosure item.

declarations.name: RgDialogElement
declarations.summary: Modal surface backed by native dialog.

declarations.name: RgDrawerElement
declarations.summary: Edge-aligned modal surface.

declarations.name: RgTooltipElement
declarations.summary: Focus and hover supplementary label.

declarations.name: RgButtonGroupElement
declarations.summary: Accessible horizontal or vertical action grouping.

declarations.name: RgComboboxElement
declarations.summary: Filterable, form-associated single-select combobox.

declarations.name: RgDatePickerElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated date field with native and custom calendar presentations.

declarations.name: RgTimePickerElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated time field with AM/PM, hour, and minute controls.

declarations.name: RgDateTimePickerElement
declarations.summary: Form-associated date and time field with a unified custom picker.

declarations.name: RgKbdElement
declarations.summary: Keyboard shortcut or physical key notation.

declarations.name: RgFieldsetElement
declarations.summary: Semantic grouping for related form controls.

declarations.name: RgEmptyStateElement
declarations.summary: Structured placeholder for an empty collection or workflow.

declarations.name: RgBreadcrumbElement
declarations.summary: Labeled hierarchy navigation trail.

declarations.name: RgBreadcrumbItemElement
declarations.summary: Link or current location inside a breadcrumb trail.

declarations.name: RgPaginationElement
declarations.summary: Compact paged navigation with configurable ranges.

declarations.name: RgStepIndicatorElement
declarations.summary: Shows progress through a fixed, linear multi-step flow.

declarations.name: RgStepElement
declarations.summary: Names one stateful position inside a step indicator.

declarations.name: RgPopoverElement
declarations.summary: Non-modal anchored content surface.

declarations.name: RgMenuElement
declarations.summary: Anchored action menu with roving keyboard focus.

declarations.name: RgMenuItemElement
declarations.summary: Selectable action owned by rg-menu.

declarations.name: RgCopyButtonElement
declarations.summary: Clipboard action with accessible success and error feedback.

declarations.name: RgChipGroupElement

declarations.name: RgChipElement
declarations.summary: Selectable or removable token owned by rg-chip-group.

declarations.name: RgSegmentedControlElement

declarations.name: RgSegmentElement

declarations.name: RgProgressRingElement
declarations.summary: Compact circular determinate or indeterminate progress indicator.

declarations.name: RgRatingElement

declarations.name: RgRelativeTimeElement

declarations.name: RgTimelineElement

declarations.name: RgTimelineItemElement
declarations.summary: Timestamped entry rendered within an rg-timeline.

declarations.name: RgFormatDateElement
declarations.summary: Formats an absolute date and time with native Intl semantics.

declarations.name: RgFormatNumberElement
declarations.summary: Formats decimal, percentage, and currency values for a locale.

declarations.name: RgFormatBytesElement
declarations.summary: Formats byte and bit quantities with decimal SI units.
